# 🛡️ CyberLens AI

<p align="center">
  <h3 align="center">AI-Powered Website Security & Intelligence Platform</h3>
  <p align="center">
    Analyze websites, detect security risks, inspect infrastructure, and generate AI-powered security insights.
  </p>
</p>

---

## 🚀 Live Demo

🌐 Demo: https://cyberlensesecure.netlify.app/check

📂 GitHub Repository:
https://github.com/Zeroes-X-Ones/cyberlensai

---

## 📌 Problem Statement

Website owners, security researchers, startups, and organizations often lack a single platform that can quickly assess website security posture, infrastructure exposure, technology stack, DNS configuration, SSL health, and potential risks.

CyberLens AI solves this by providing a unified AI-powered cybersecurity intelligence dashboard.

---

## 🎯 Solution

CyberLens AI performs comprehensive website reconnaissance and security analysis through a single interface.

Users simply enter a domain and receive:

* Security Analysis
* DNS Intelligence
* SSL/TLS Inspection
* Technology Stack Detection
* Open Port Discovery
* WHOIS Information
* HTTP Security Header Analysis
* Malware & Phishing Checks
* Infrastructure Mapping
* Performance Insights
* AI-Powered Security Summary

---

## ✨ Features

### 🔍 Website Intelligence

* DNS Records Lookup
* WHOIS Information
* IP Analysis
* Server Information
* Hosting Detection

### 🔐 Security Assessment

* SSL Certificate Analysis
* TLS Security Audit
* Security Headers Check
* HSTS Verification
* DNSSEC Validation

### 🌐 Infrastructure Mapping

* Open Ports
* Traceroute
* Associated Domains
* Subdomain Discovery
* Redirect Chain Analysis

### 🛡 Threat Intelligence

* Malware Detection
* Phishing Detection
* Reputation Checks
* Blocklist Verification

### ⚡ Performance Analysis

* Lighthouse Metrics
* SEO Checks
* Accessibility Review
* Performance Scoring

### 🤖 AI Security Insights

* Risk Summary
* Threat Assessment
* Security Recommendations
* Overall Security Score

---

## 🏗 Architecture

User
↓
Frontend (Astro + React)
↓
CyberLens AI Engine
↓
Security Modules
├── DNS Analysis
├── SSL Analysis
├── WHOIS Lookup
├── Security Headers
├── Malware Detection
├── Tech Stack Detection
└── Performance Analysis

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack

Frontend:

* Astro
* React
* TypeScript
* Emotion CSS

Backend:

* Node.js
* Express

Security Intelligence:

* DNS Lookup
* WHOIS
* TLS Inspection
* Wappalyzer
* Lighthouse

Deployment:

* Netlify

Version Control:

* GitHub

## ⚙️ Installation

Clone Repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Zeroes-X-Ones/cyberlensai.git
```

Move Into Project

```bash
cd cyberlensai
```

Install Dependencies

```bash
yarn install
```

Run Development Server

```bash
yarn dev
```

Build Production Version

```bash
yarn build
```
